label: Raw Material
title: High-Grade Raw Material Selection
description: Vacuum sizing tanks ensure precise outer diameter while internal pressure maintains perfect roundness and wall thickness uniformity.

label: Extrusion
title: Precision Extrusion Process
description: Material is melted and forced through a calibrated die at controlled temperature and speed to form a continuous pipe profile.

label: Cooling
title: Controlled Cooling Bath
description: The extruded pipe passes through a water cooling trough maintaining dimensional stability and surface finish quality.

label: Sizing
title: Diameter Sizing & Calibration
description: Inline gauging systems continuously measure outer diameter and wall thickness, feeding data back to the extrusion line.

label: Quality Control
title: In-Process Quality Checks
description: Each production run is monitored against IS 4984 and ISO 4427 standards through inline and offline testing.

label: Marking
title: Product Identification Marking
description: Pipes are inkjet-marked with product details including size, pressure rating, standard, batch number, and date of manufacture.

label: Cutting
title: Precision Cutting to Length
description: Automated cutters slice pipes to exact specified lengths with clean, square ends ready for immediate installation or coiling.

label: Packaging
title: Secure Packaging & Dispatch
description: Finished pipes are bundled, labelled, and prepared for dispatch with full documentation including test certificates.
